chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1279 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of case For hearing of main case 10-09-2025 Syed Mujahid Ali Shah, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional A.G. **** Counsel for the petitioner, under instructions, does not press this petition for the time being and submits that the petitioner, in the first instance, will approach the competent Medical Assessment Board, constituted under the Sindh Persons with Disabilities Protection Authority, Department of Empowerment of Persons with Disabilities, Government of Sindh, for obtaining a Disability Assessment Certificate and thereafter will apply for appointment under the Disability Quota in terms of the relevant Government advertisement. Order accordingly. The instant petition stands disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
